elements.title: lang::report_page_028_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ra.id AS id,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       stat.assignments,
       stat.completed,
       stat.submissions,
       stat.grades,
       kbi_l.timespend,
       visits
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_u.id
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_a.course                           AS courseid,
                         COUNT(distinct kbi_a.id)               AS assignments,
                         COUNT(distinct kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid) AS completed,
                         COUNT(distinct kbi_s.assignment)       AS submissions,
                         COUNT(distinct kbi_g.assignment)       AS grades
                  FROM mdl_assign kbi_a
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'assign'
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.instance = kbi_a.id AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND
                                                                        kbi_cmc.completionstate IN
                                                                        (1,
                                                                         2)
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_submission kbi_s ON kbi_s.status = 'submitted' AND kbi_s.assignment = kbi_a.id
                         LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.assignment = kbi_a.id
                  WHERE kbi_a.course > 0
                    AND kbi_a.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_a.course) stat ON stat.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_l.userid, kbi_l.courseid, SUM(kbi_l.timespend) as timespend, SUM(kbi_l.visits) as visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_l, mdl_modules kbi_m, mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
                  WHERE kbi_l.page = 'module'
                    and kbi_m.name = 'assign'
                    AND kbi_cm.id = kbi_l.param
                    AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
                    AND kbi_l.courseid = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_l.userid, kbi_l.courseid) l ON kbi_l.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_l.courseid = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 3
